summary: Iteration 25: Comprehensive testing of dual logo system, footer text management, ImageUpload components, and UI fixes. All 16 backend tests passed. Frontend testing verified all major features working correctly.

issues: Logo images show broken image icon when using test URLs (expected - test data). Real logos display correctly.

critical_code_review_comments: BooksManager.js and AboutManager.js correctly use ImageUpload component for image fields
Footer.js correctly uses settings.footer_description and settings.footer_copyright for dynamic text
Navbar.js implements dual logo system (logo_on_1 for hero, logo_on_2 for scrolled state)
Dialog button overrides in index.css use [role='dialog'] selector to target portal-rendered modals
Modern footer includes internal pages (footerPages) in Navigation section
seed_data_creation: Test data created for logo_on_1, logo_on_2, footer_description, footer_copyright fields during backend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features from iteration 25 are working. Settings > General tab has Logo ON #1, Logo ON #2, Logo OFF, Favicon, Footer Description, and Footer Copyright fields. Dual logo system works (logo changes on scroll). My Account link appears in navbar and mobile menu for logged-in users. Internal pages have proper top padding. Gallery and Reading List pages have proper top padding. Admin and My Account sidebars show logo_off. BooksManager and AboutManager use ImageUpload components.
